title: Nutrition Month
desc: The Members of the club had a nutrition month, where they made a lot of dishes which were very healthy

title: Learning the art of plating
desc: The members of the club learned how to present the food that they made with the best manner because first impression is everything

title: Making Fireless dishes
desc: The club members learned that making food doesn't always need fire.

title: Making sustainable bags
desc: The memebers of eco club made sustainable bags out of cloth to combat the growing polution cased by single use plastic bags

title: Making sustainable and beautiful pen holders
desc: The menmbers of Eco Club made sustainble and beautiful pen holders for students chasing astheticness and sustainablity

title: Discussion and project of saving the Earth
desc: The members of Eco club made posters on the ways we ccan save the Earth and had a discussion on it

title: Tragic Act in inter-school competiton
desc: The members of Theatre club went to another school to present their tragic and thought-provoking act

title: Hindu story retold with an act
desc: The members of Theatre club presented an act showing a classic story in Hinduism in front of other students

title: Member winning an award for his great perfomance
desc: A member of Theatre club went to a prestigious acting competition and showed his skills and got an award for his performance by the organizers

title: The Idea Lab: Peer Pitch & Review Session
desc: Members of the TED-Ed Club actively listen and provide critical feedback as a peer pitches their "Idea Worth Spreading" to refine its impact before the final script.

title: Debate on global issues
desc: The members of Ted-Ed club had a friendly debate competition on the topic of standardization of education across the globe.

title: Taking tips about Story telling from the mentor
desc: The members of Ted-Ed club had a massive discussion with their mentor about the best ways to deliver a story before a competition

title: The Sink or Float Experiment
desc: Members of the Technogrades Club demonstrated the properties of buoyancy by testing various materials in water and explaining the science behind density to their peers.

title: Exploring the Science of Osmosis
desc: Exploring the Science of OsmosisMembers of the Technocrats Club delivered a presentation on the process of osmosis, using diagrams and experimental data to explain how water molecules move through biological membranes.

title: Mechanics on Wheel Photogame
desc: Members of the club organized an interactive exhibit featuring mechanical models and digital displays to demonstrate the principles of automotive engineering and physics through a gamified learning experience.

title: Automated Infrastructure Model
desc: The members of the Robotics Club designed and engineered a functional "Automatic Toll Gate" prototype to demonstrate how sensor-based automation can streamline traffic flow and modernize transit infrastructure.

title: Hands-on Robotics and Coding
desc: The members of the Robotics Club engaged in a dynamic, hands-on workshop, working together with their mentor to build and program a robotic component. This session focused on integrating physical engineering with core programming logic, helping students move from theory to actual implementation.

title: Radar System Development
desc: The members of the Robotics Club applied their engineering and programming knowledge to develop a real-time "Sonar Radar System." Students constructed the hardware using sensor technology and designed a dynamic software interface to detect object positions, demonstrating practical applications of detection systems.
